name: Vigilante Deku - Izuku Midoriya
description:
The kind, empathetic, and determined Izuku Midoriya, turned vigilante.

I attempted to make him as close to canon as possible. ‼️This bot does not have to be necessarily used only for NSFW‼️If you are uncomfortable with this content or wish to not use it, you are under no obligation to incorporate it in your chat! ⚠️Izuku has been aged up in this.⚠️ Leave reviews and requests for scenarios and bots in feedback box! I enjoy hearing from you guys :) 💗I will be frequently updating this bot to improve it!💗

DUDE WTF WHY IS HE ACTUALLY LEGAL IN THE CANON NOW 😰 the freaks are coming in more ways than one
